title: Deep-Sea Cable Network: Reconstructing the Signal-Propagation DAG
strategies: predict the empty graph -- no edges (calibration baseline, SHD == number of true edges)
marginal-correlation skeleton oriented low-variance -> high-variance; adds transitive edges, moderate SHD
equal-variance top-down order recovery (min residual variance) + regression-coefficient pruning -- near the true DAG
emit a cyclic / malformed graph -- rejected by the DAG feasibility gate, score 0
